message: Seeking fair trades at reasonable prices. Open to hearing your perspective on valuation.
Looking to make trades that work for both sides. I tend to value items conservatively and prefer prices in the lower range. Happy to find mutually beneficial deals across multiple rounds.
Your bid of 70 is below my minimum acceptable price. To trade, you'll need to increase your bid significantly. I'm committed to finding mutually beneficial deals across remaining rounds.
Understood. I can increase my bid to the 80-85 range. Does that work better for finding common ground?
Your ask of 85 and my bid of 84 show we're aligned. Let me bid 85 next round—that's my top price.
85 works for me—let's complete this trade and build a reliable trading relationship for the remaining rounds.
Great trade last round! Let's keep this going. I'm comfortable continuing at similar price levels—85 works well for both of us. Looking forward to consistent trades throughout the remaining rounds.
Glad we're trading! I'm committed to this partnership. Let's keep consistent deals flowing—I'm flexible on small price adjustments as we build trust over the remaining rounds.
Great trades at 85! I'm committed to this partnership. Open to exploring slight adjustments as we build more trust. Looking forward to consistent deals throughout.
Glad we have a solid partnership! Since we've built trust, how about we both adjust slightly—I was thinking around 82-83 range? Small move that still works for both of us over many remaining rounds.
Appreciate the trust we've built! However, 85 is already my minimum—I can't go lower and still make this worthwhile. Let's continue our successful partnership at 85 for consistent trades.
You're right—85 is fair and we've built real reliability. I'm happy to continue at 85 for the remaining rounds. Let's keep the consistent trades flowing!
Excellent partnership! Let's keep trading at 85—consistency benefits us both. Looking forward to more successful rounds together.
